findings.title: Checkout form silently drops payment data on submit
findings.description: Submitting the checkout form with valid credit card data returns success but no charge is created. Order appears in dashboard with $0.00 total.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Add item to cart. 2. Proceed to checkout. 3. Enter valid payment info. 4. Click Submit.
findings.expected: Payment is processed and order total matches cart
findings.actual: Order created with $0.00 total, no payment charge

findings.title: Login form inputs have no associated labels
findings.description: Email and password fields use placeholder text only, with no <label> elements or aria-label attributes. Screen readers cannot identify the fields.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to /login and inspect form elements
findings.expected: Each input has an associated label element
findings.actual: Inputs have placeholder only, no labels

findings.title: Unhandled promise rejection on dashboard load
findings.description: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') appears in console when loading the dashboard with no data.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Log in as new user with no data, navigate to /dashboard

findings.title: LCP exceeds 4 seconds on product listing page
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint is 4.2 seconds due to unoptimized hero image (2.8 MB PNG).

findings.title: Modal content overflows on mobile viewport
findings.description: Settings modal extends beyond viewport at 320px width, with no scroll and a clipped close button.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Open settings modal at 320px viewport width
findings.expected: Modal fits within viewport or scrolls internally

findings.title: No loading indicator during search
findings.description: Performing a search shows no loading state. Results appear after 1-2 seconds with no feedback.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Enter a search query and submit
findings.expected: Loading spinner or skeleton while results load

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: The application does not send a Content-Security-Policy header, increasing XSS risk.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Inspect response headers on any page

findings.title: Lorem ipsum placeholder text in footer
findings.description: The footer 'About Us' section contains 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...' placeholder text.
findings.steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to footer on any page

findings.title: Inconsistent button border-radius across pages
findings.description: Buttons on /settings use 4px border-radius while buttons on /profile use 8px.
